scripts.cap:sync: node scripts/prepare-native-api-url.mjs && vite build && cap sync
scripts.cap:android: node scripts/prepare-native-api-url.mjs && vite build && cap sync android && cap open android
scripts.cap:ios: node scripts/prepare-native-api-url.mjs && vite build && cap sync ios && cap open ios
scripts.cap:apk: node scripts/prepare-native-api-url.mjs && vite build && cap sync android && node scripts/generate-android-icons.mjs && powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/build-apk.ps1
scripts.cap:apk:prod: node scripts/prepare-native-api-url.mjs --production && vite build && cap sync android && node scripts/generate-android-icons.mjs && powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/build-apk.ps1
scripts.cap:apk:prod:fast: node scripts/prepare-native-api-url.mjs --production && vite build && cap sync android && powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/build-apk.ps1
